name: daily-workflow-briefs
description: Manager's daily Slack briefs — morning, throughout-the-day poll, and EOD. Calendar + Gmail + Zoom required; Jira + HubSpot optional. Offers to do follow-up work for you with explicit approval.

plugins.name: daily-workflow-briefs
plugins.description: Three automated Slack briefs (morning, poll, EOD) with a work-offer approval loop. Pulls from Calendar, Gmail, Zoom; optional Jira and HubSpot.
